El juego promete su gameplay haciendo que su papel en la posición sea fundamental, alguien fanático del futbol o competitivo le gustaría.
Pero el problema viene a que viene con problemas de optimización
- Consume de 2gb de ram en la pantalla de carga y más en partido.
- En medio de un juego online se crashea cuando el rival hace un tiro, volviendo al menú.
Estas cosas pueden perjudicar la competitividad haciendolo injugable.
Pero quitando de lado eso, recomiendo jugarlo si tenés los requisitos recomendados para arriba.

reviews.review: 完全垃圾遊戲

This game has beautiful gameplay and great potential to grow. However, it still suffers from many bugs, a lack of mods, limited skins, and a competitive system that makes ranking up very difficult—especially with unbalanced matchmaking. On top of that, the reward system in competitive mode feels trash: you gain around +20 for a win but lose -16 for a loss, no matter how well you perform. There is also absolutely no punishment for players who leave mid-game or troll, and the reporting system is very weak. The price feels too high for what it currently offers. I’d really love to see this game become free-to-play, similar to Valorant or Fortnite. Overall, the game has promise, but it needs more work and improvements before it can truly shine.

Баги и технические проблемы встречаются на каждом шагу. Вратари сделаны ужасно они просто не играбельные, после бета теста я не чувствую персонажа они как будто слишком тяжелые это не спортсмены а просто дети которые только начели играть в футбол. Создается впечатление, что игру выпустили в крайне сыром состоянии. Не рекомендую тратить время и деньги на эту игру. Ожидания не оправдываются абсолютно ни по одному параметру. Лучше дождаться, когда разработчики исправят хотя бы часть проблем, если вообще возьмутся за это.

"Master" oyununun arkasındaki stüdyo, aksiyonun akıcılığını spora taşıdı. Bu modern ve hızlı tempolu futbol oyununda sınır yok, duvarlardan sekerek ilerliyor. Bu da genel akışı önemli ölçüde geliştiriyor. Komik abartılı top sürme sahneleri olmadan, geleneksel futbolun temel cazibesine bağlı kalıyor. Her biri eğitimde titizlikle açıklanan çok sayıda işlem ve kombinasyon gerektiren geniş bir hareket yelpazesi eklendi. Sahada, oyuncular hem fiziksel hem de zihinsel becerilerini kullanarak değişen koşullara uyum sağlamalıdır. Örneğin, karakteristik duvarlardan sekerek ilerleme özelliği harika bir sinerji yaratıyor. Oyuncular kaleci bile olabiliyor.

90% бюджета игры ушло на стримеров, чтобы раскрутить и популяризировать данное убожество. Игра для нетерпеливых людей с синдромом СДВГ. В игре, по сравнению с FIFA и PES  хуёв0 абсолютно всё, ЭТО НЕ ФУТБОЛ, ИМ ДАЖЕ БЛИЗКО НЕ ПАХНЕТ... Это кривая подделка с али экспресс самого наихудшего качества... Кривая физика мяча, пасов, ударов, дриблинга, тебе предлагают играть на клаве и мыше))) Наиграв в серию игр PES и FIFA более 5 тысяч часов суммарно и сравнив почти все части из них могу отметить, что данная блевотина не поддается никакому терпению.... ибо меня более чем на 15 минут не хватило, но и этого в данном случае достаточно для меня,  уже могу сформировать мнение и оценить данное ..., так как в нормальные футбольные симуляторы я наиграл не мало.. 

Раздражает то, что одноклеточные создания расфорсили данный кал положительными отзывами, насмотревшись стримеров, которым проплатили пиар этой "игры", ибо это порождает размножение подобного мусора в игровой индустрии и убивает напрочь хорошие некогда игры, по типу PES, отрицательными отзывами

Juego completamente arruinado, he jugado desde la primera beta, me encantó la idea de este juego y creí en ella. Compré la edición más cara para apoyarles también y todo han sido problemas desde que lo compré.
1. Los 3 días de acceso anticipado.
Fuimos como una beta-test antes de que sacaran el juego.
2. Salida del juego
A la salida oficial del juego, metieron más cosas, una introducción, tutorial, etc... Que no tiene sentido que estuviera aquí y no en el acceso anticipado pero bueno... Habían algunos bugs molestos, mecánicas rotas y cosas que no funcionaban muy allá, sobretodo los servidores, había fé y con parches y hotfixes consiguieron ir arreglando poco a poco.
3.SoloQ
La experiencia SoloQ sigue siendo horrible como el día 1, no hay un matchmaking decende, o la gente que se supone que está en tu rango ha llegado ahí de milagro.
4. Season 1
El parche anterior a la Season 1, ya se había cargado varias mecánicas y tipos de juego, a mí me gustó, solo le faltaba tocar alguna cosa de algún bug y ya, no había que hacer mucho más, pero hicieron todo lo contrario, han tocado absolutamente todo, ya no puedes regatear decentemente, el movimiento se siente horrible, siguen habiendo los mismos bugs que había en la beta, han dejado mecánicas que quitaron en el anterior parche y que dijeron que no las querían, han tomado un montón de decisiones y una vez más, tras un parche grande, se han vuelto a cargar su juego, sinceramente este juego prometía pero ha tenido un desarollo horroroso, no saben balancearlo y un juego competitivo al que le dedicas tantas horas que te cambien como funciona cada mecánica cada mes es desesperante. Sinceramente, no quiero que se muera, pero ya vamos por 10k de players en steam, tristemente se acabará muriendo solo porque esta gente no sabe arreglar su juego, lo pasé muy bien las horas que lo jugué y conocí una comunidad muy amable y me quedaré con eso, por el resto, vaya puta mierda de juego.

I think this game has a lot of potential, but unfortunately the player base really ruins the experience. Most players are selfish, only trying to score and show off instead of playing as a team. Since this is supposed to be a team-based game, it completely breaks the fun when nobody cares about teamwork. On top of that, people often quit matches halfway through, leaving the rest of us stuck in an unfair game.
Right now, it’s not enjoyable at all. With better community behavior or systems to encourage teamwork, this could actually become a great game — but as it is, it’s just frustrating.
Advice to the publisher: consider making the game free-to-play and focus on cosmetic monetization instead. FIFA (EA FC) already dominates the market as a premium football game, so going F2P could give Rematch a better chance to grow its player base and compete more effectively.

A game that requires teamwork and relies on by their very nature selfish people, doesn't work. The tutorial has an almost poetic way of telling you to be a cooperative player, showing you the story of a man failing without his teammates. However in reality, each game is simply the most unforgiving of sweaty people, passing only if its an extreme risk of losing possession. If you enjoyed schoolyard soccer matches where its a mob of 3-5 rushing you, and the one guy who is sort of good at shooting is passed the ball over and over, then this is for you! Two matches for me was more than enough to pass.

Soy un padre de 50 años, probablemente una de las personas más viejas que juegan este juego. Soy padre soltero de mi hijo, que ahora tiene 14 años. Mi hijo recientemente descargó REMATCH y en menos de una semana, ya había jugado durante más de 20 horas. Esto fue terrible para mí, ya que ya era bastante difícil para mí pasar tiempo con mi hijo, ya que él siempre sale con sus amigos o simplemente mira videos en Tiktok. Así que decidí crear una cuenta de Steam y comprar este juego para ver si podía jugar junto a él. Cargué el juego, hice el tutorial pero estaba atascado en lo que se suponía que debías hacer. Le pedí ayuda a mi hijo y organizó un juego para que yo me uniera. Me encantó porque era el mejor momento que había pasado con mi hijo desde que mi esposa había muerto. Desde entonces, este juego ha acercado a mi hijo y a mí nuevamente y ahora también pasamos tiempo juntos fuera de la casa. Este juego me recordó que hay diversión en todo, y nos ha traído tanto a mí como a mi hijo muchos recuerdos felices.

In a vacuum, this I would say that the game is fun. When put in practice, it's functionally broken.

Matchmaking in this game feels... flawed? Time and time again it feels like you're constantly paired up with players who grief and ruin everyone's enjoyment, own goal, refusing to pass, spamming good job, etc. There's barely any noteworthy repercussions for bad sportsmanship.  Especially since there is in no way shape or form a way to block teaming up with unruly players.

Hitreg is a whole can of worms on its own. It feels awful and clunky. 50/50's and certain priorities make zero sense. The jumping volley has insane priority, clearing it with a header is a toss up even with EE & the Q block is incredibly unreliable sometimes.  Goalkeeping is arduous due to how detrimental the consistency of the role is. 

There needs to be better ways of communication, instead of just "pass", "good job", "we got this", "sorry" & "thanks". It's barely serviceable. 

The worst part are the freezing and crashing. The service disconnection, it's just an utter mess. Ranked is completely botched because there's a 1/5 chance the game will just die which leaves you and your team at a serious disadvantage. 

I'd describe it the best as a defective product. It has all the elements that makes it really fun and conceptually, the mechanics are great, however, nothing works as it should and I don't just speak for myself.
There are way too many technicalities that don't function which makes the experience miserable in the long run. 

It sucks cause the game *is* fun, it's one of my favorite games right now even, it just doesn't work.

O jogo é decente, embora me faça passar muita raiva às vezes. Em toda partida personalizada que eu jogo, os jogadores caem do mapa. O jogo é repleto de bugs, falhas e até manipulação de resultados. A hitbox é ridícula: você derruba o cara no chão e, do nada, ele levanta e te acerta. Mas o que mais irrita é simplesmente o fato de o jogo, do nada repito, do nada crashar, além de jogadores invisíveis e o mapa travar. Realmente, uma lástima. É divertido sim, mas me dá raiva. Se você for hipertenso, não jogue, porque vai passar mal. Como diria Schopenhauer, “a vida oscila entre o sofrimento e o tédio” e esse jogo parece ter entendido isso muito bem.

I enjoy the game. Haven't really encountered any bugs yet. Runs and looks well on a 970 (low settings). Definitely needs more players but I haven't played it since crossplay was added. Definitely played with some selfish players who think they can dribble the ball into the net. Personally, I just let them play and sit in goals waiting for them to inevitably give away the ball. More modes and the ability to search for more than one at a time should be features that the developers look to add.  It seemed like there was a glimpse of a story in the prologue. So maybe an offline season like in Rocket League (more intelligent AI than RL) with some rewards for winning like unique shoes, hairstyle, shirt or celebration. Also, I think they should have another look at one of the skill games. The one where you are in an el rondo and have to intercept the pass. Impossible to do without luck. This game has the potential and the niche to be a very popular game. I think it is a really cool game that sits between FC and RL. Sloclap just have to keep improving the game with big features and loads of bug fixes. Unfortunately, I don't agree with this new policy that games need to have a season pass and charge an arm and a leg for the game (like Rematch and FC). It should be one or the other. Free game with season pass or paid game with no season pass. I'd wait for a big sale or f2p if it happens. I recommend the game but not for the price.

Si en un par de años el juego mejora, y no el apartado de jugabilidad o modos, sino en el jodido rendimiento, estabilidad de conexión, servidores no alimentados por hamsters corriendo en ruedas, etc... Entonces si lo veis de oferta por menos de 10€/10$ o 15 millones de bolivares, entonces me lo pensaría.

"Monos y caballeros, no hay damas en este juego comprendanlo monos, este juego es una reverenda tarta de boquerones, quizás tiene pintaza desde lejos, pero una vez que estás cerca o la pruebas sabe a cloaca.
El matchmakin es peor que clavarte jeringuillas en los testículos, o en su inexistente defecto, en los ovarios, puedes jugar con suerte y si a los servidores mantenidos con ventiladores de manivela y dinamo lo permiten, la friolera de ¡¡¡¡¡¡1!!!!! partida, sin bugs o fallos extraños. 
Uno de los fallos más comunes que me han pasado a mí o a los suso dicho monos con los que juego (me incluyo, manchas de aceite, coches, senos, furbo, moto) es la técnica desarrollada por Dani Olmo en la temporada 25/26 con el fc barcelona,
el falso jugador.
Correcto no has leido mal, falso jugador, consiste en que estás físicamente en el juego y te puedes mover, pero olvidate de oler el esférico, es decir, Ferran en el area pequeña, o Vinicius en todo el campo de juego, y todo esto de no tocar bolas no es porque tu no quieras o porque tus compañeros han decidico que tienes dos pies izquierdos y seria mejor pasarsela al niño sin piernas al que le marcó Maradonna, no es porque el juego decide que estás en un plano superior del terreno de juego, Utilero.
Luego otra nueva mecánica de este increible juego es la de tarjeta roja a minuto cero de partido, para los hinchas del Getafe es otro día más en la oficina, empiezas el jodido partido con uno menos porque el juego detectó que el jugador pulsó muy fuerte el botón X ,A o si eres terrorista, cualquier tecla.
La broma igual hace gracia una o dos veces, un poco de handicap para nivelar el juego, como dijo el gran filosofo Richard Watterson, es gracioso cuando no te pasa a ti. 
En resumen, juego de mierda, las rankeds están rotas. Ahora después de quejarme abiertamente, procedo a jugar 20 horas más diciendo que el juego es una mierda. 
Un saludo y recuerden a día de hoy, 27/09/25, el barcelona gana la sexta champions con balón de oro Gerard Martín, el heroe del pueblo."
Won't reccomend this game as a solo player but if you have friends it can be quite fun.
Es macht echt Spaß und ich hoffe die Entwickler bringen auch einen offline und Lan Party modus raus.

I really enjoyed this game before Season 1, but it gets clunkier and feels worse to play with every update. Steering the super sprint feels like steering a truck now and turning during a sprint almost always results in losing the ball. Goalkeeper catches feel absolutely random, sometimes balls get caught eventhough the goalkeeper is jumping in the opposite direction and sometimes goalkeepers just jump directly through the ball. The general hitboxes of the player models feel huge at times, blocking balls that very obviously pass over someone's head, while sometimes also just passing through people standing in front of the attacker.

I really want this game to succeed and for them to change all this stuff around, but currently, every update only makes it worse.

Let’s not sugarcoat this: Rematch is a disaster. It’s the kind of game that makes you wonder how something this broken made it past quality testing — assuming there was any.

 Gameplay: Zero Skill, All RNG

Rematch tries so hard to be competitive and skill-based, but everything falls apart the second you touch the controls. The matches look like fast-paced sports action, but in reality, it’s pure chaos wrapped in lag and poor design.

Defending is overpowered to the point where attacking feels useless. You can make the perfect play, time your shot flawlessly — and the game just says “no.”

Passing is random garbage. Sometimes your player magnetically locks onto the ball, other times it flies straight through their legs like they’re a ghost.

Goalkeeping? A joke. Your character dives at the right time, touches the ball, and still — somehow — it counts as a goal. It’s like the physics engine is running on pure delusion.

And when it all goes wrong, it’s never about skill — it’s because the game itself decided to glitch out.

It’s hard to “get good” when every input feels like a gamble. You’re not competing against other players; you’re fighting against Rematch’s broken code.

 Bugs, Glitches, and Technical Nightmares

Let’s talk about the endless technical issues — because Rematch is basically a museum of bad programming.

Desync everywhere. The ball teleports. Players freeze. Sometimes you’re celebrating a goal while your opponent’s screen still shows the match starting.

Crashes galore. Half the time the game decides to just shut down mid-match, robbing you of points, progress, and your sanity.

Unresponsive controls. Your player occasionally stops moving altogether, as if they’re contemplating their life choices for playing this mess.

Horrific netcode. Lag spikes, rubberbanding, teleporting — every match feels like it’s being streamed from Mars.

Visual inconsistencies. The animation shows you blocking a shot cleanly — but somehow, the ball phases through your body. It’s a fever dream of bad hit detection.

Matchmaking hell. Wait times are long, team balance doesn’t exist, and the skill levels are all over the place. Prepare to get stomped or bored — there’s no in-between.

It’s the kind of game where you can feel your patience evaporate with every bug. Every time you think, “Maybe the next patch will fix it,” it somehow gets worse.

 Value: Not Worth a Single Cent

The game has the audacity to charge real money for cosmetics when the core experience barely functions. Cross-play? Barely works. Patches? Rare, and often break more than they fix.

You’d think after months of updates, they’d at least stabilize the servers — but no. Rematch feels like an early-access title that forgot to finish developing.

 Verdict: Dead on Arrival

Rematch could’ve been something special. The concept has potential — team sports with a competitive twist. But everything else is a flaming wreck: gameplay, balance, netcode, mechanics, you name it.

At best, it’s occasionally fun when nothing breaks — which happens about once every ten matches. At worst (which is most of the time), it’s a laggy, buggy, rage-inducing nightmare that makes you question your life choices.

Final Score: 3/10.

Игра «Рематч» — это настоящее открытие для тех, кто любит соревновательный дух и азарт! Каждая партия здесь полна неожиданностей, а напряжение держится до самого финала. Мне очень понравилось, что правила простые и понятные, но при этом каждое решение влияет на исход. Нет ощущения скуки или предсказуемости — наоборот, всегда хочется попробовать ещё раз и взять реванш!

Отдельное удовольствие доставляет атмосфера — игра вызывает азарт, смех и бурные эмоции у всей компании. «Рематч» легко собирает друзей за столом и превращает обычный вечер в маленький праздник.

Я искренне рекомендую эту игру всем любителям настольных развлечений. Это отличная находка как для новичков, так и для опытных игроков. Подарите себе «Рематч» — и вы точно не пожалеете!

Rematch is absolutely incredible, honestly one of the best football games I’ve ever played. The gameplay feels fantastic, fast, and fun, and it really stands out compared to other football titles. That said, there are still a few minor bugs here and there, but nothing game-breaking, and I trust the developers will sort them out soon. My only real concern is the price. For a group of friends, it feels a bit expensive to all buy separately. A feature like a “Friend Pass” would make a huge difference, where players who own the game could invite their friends to join for free. This would make it much more accessible and grow the community even faster. Overall, an amazing game with massive potential just hoping for some adjustments to make it easier for friends to play together.

Rematch - это то, во что без друзей лучше не заходить.
Серьезно, основная идея в этой пиналочке - слаженная игра с командой, где у каждого есть возможность реализовать себя, так еще и на разных разных ролях. Ты не привязан к одной роли, что делает не таким обидным момент, когда стоишь на воротах (если тебе не нравится), ведь через следующее очко - роли поменяются. Вроде бы идея неплохая, никому не обидно и все кайфуют, но вот только все руки ебали твои ворота и слаженную командную игру, ибо человек с ником "egoist235" выбежит с мячом из наших ворот, у него в мгновение ока отберут шарик и забьют по пустым. Возможность выбить мяч у союзника, бить по своим воротам и руинить, просто выйдя из игры или стоя в afk - невыносимо и слишком безнаказанно. Нету системы репортов, нету возможности доджа. Я знал о всех этих проблемах еще ранее, потому-что читал отзывы, но я не думал, что все настолько плохо. У нас есть коллабы с брендами, футболистами и сырой магазин с косметикой, возможность сделать такого персонажа, который подойдет Sweet baby inc как основа под главного героя какой-нибудь игрушки, но нету базовых систем в игре, где весь смысл заключается в командной игре и если у тебя не получается сыграться с человеком или он нагло руинит - просто заблокировать его в своем подборе. Спасибо за пробные дни, так бы купил и пылилась в библиотеке.

[h1]Comentario Analítico: "REMATCH"[/h1]

REMATCH es un entretenido juego de Football multijugador, casual y sencillo en el que, a diferencia del resto de juegos basados en tal deporte, controlamos a un personaje en concreto en lugar de a un equipo en conjunto.

Kinestéticamente es muy cómodo y si bien visualmente tiene este estilo genérico a la Corporate Memphis tal como si de un minijuego de Fortnite se tratase, hay un esfuerzo sobresaliente en que cada partida sea mucho dinámica e interactiva de lo que en principio aparenta; y ahí esta el problema, REMATCH espera que vos y tus compañeros trabajen en equipo, pero si decidís entrar a una match con gente al azar vas a cruzarte con gente que, de tener la pelota, jamás te la van a pasar.

No tuve la oportunidad de jugarlo con amigos pero entiendo que es preferible el diálogo por voz con gente con la que previamente pactaste cooperar.

Si jugaste a la beta antes de este estreno oficial quizá te quedaron archivos residuales en Appdata\Local, es importante borrarlos para evitar que el juego crashee al buscar partida o que tu personaje no se controle tal y como lo asignaste en las opciones.

[b]¿En conclusión?[/b] Está entretenido.

В это играть невозможно. Я поиграл на релизе и понял, что пока что это сырой продукт. 
Я специально не заходил 4-5 обновлений, только каждый раз читал сколько всего исправлено. 
Зашел вчера, поиграл и это абсолютно тот же продукт, что был на релизе. Что они исправляли - не знаю.
Чего только стоит, что в ФУТБОЛЬНОМ СИМУЛЯТОРЕ (ИЛИ ФУТБОЛЬНОЙ АРКАДЕ), ты отдаешь ПАС а он летит не на того, кого ты направил, а отдает себе за спину назад. Это бред. 
Вместо этого люди отдают пас кнопкой удара, так как он летит туда куда ты направил, а пас механически просто не работает. Отборы просто скриптовые, невозможно абсолютно прочитать или предвидеть как и когда ты потеряешь мяч, просто каким то скриптовым телепортом у тебя отнимают мяч, ты спотыкаешься и бежишь назад, а противник просто задроченым финтом проходит всех, потому что баланса здесь не существует. Кто-то обсырает фифу, но там действительно симулятор в котором ты можешь контролировать практически все и имея при этом множество механик, а здесь пару кнопок управления и 3 анимации, которые разрабы умудрились сделать криво.
Это смешно и позорно. 
За это недоразумение еще и деньги берут.
Но вы и дальше штампуйте balanciaga и подобрый бред.

⚽ Rematch —

Rematch é uma proposta ambiciosa: um jogo de futebol arcade/manual onde cada jogador controla apenas um personagem, sem automações.
Mas, apesar da ideia ser boa, o lançamento trouxe uma série de problemas que deixam a experiência bem frustrante. Vamos aos detalhes:

🐞 Bugs, falhas técnicas e inconsistências

Desincronização / “teleporte” de jogadores e bola
Em muitas partidas a bola parece “sumir” ou teletransportar; animações acontecem sem efeito real; passes são cancelados sem motivo.

Crashes e travamentos
O jogo pode simplesmente fechar ou congelar, especialmente após gols ou em momentos de muita ação.

Desempenho irregular
Em partidas online é comum notar quedas de FPS, stuttering e lag, prejudicando um game que exige precisão total.

Colisões bizarras e física estranha
A bola às vezes atravessa jogadores, chutes desviados entram do nada, ou o goleiro solta a bola sem explicação.

Problemas cosméticos
Cores de uniformes e itens mudam sozinhas, times aparecem com cores quase iguais e skins pagas chegaram antes de correções importantes.

🎯 Jogabilidade, curva de aprendizado e experiência solo

Curva de aprendizado muito íngreme
Tudo é manual — passes, chutes, curva da bola — o que dá liberdade, mas é cruel para novatos. Pequenos erros são altamente punitivos.

Experiência solo frustrante
Jogar sozinho significa lidar com colegas que não passam a bola, não defendem e jogam de forma egoísta. Muitos descrevem a fila solo como uma das piores experiências em jogos competitivos.

Matchmaking desequilibrado e demorado
Partidas canceladas, espera longa, emparelhamento entre jogadores de níveis muito diferentes e até casos de entrar em partidas já em andamento.

❌ Estrutura de conteúdo e recursos faltantes

Poucos modos de jogo
Apenas 3v3, 4v4 e 5v5 no lançamento, com ranqueadas apenas em 5v5. Não existe modo offline ou IA para treinar.

Faltam recursos básicos de qualidade de vida

Sem sistema de expulsão por votação.

Sem botão de revanche ou reentrada com o mesmo time.

Sem sistema de elogios ou punições para jogadores tóxicos.

Monetização precoce
Mesmo sendo um jogo pago, já chegou com loja de cosméticos e itens de compra real, o que passa a sensação de que a monetização foi priorizada antes da estabilidade.

🌄 Expectativas vs realidade

Crossplay prometido mas adiado
Uma das funcionalidades mais aguardadas não chegou no lançamento e ainda não tem data definitiva, frustrando quem queria jogar com amigos de outras plataformas.

Base de jogadores em risco
Com tantos bugs e matchmaking falho, muitos temem que a comunidade diminua rápido, tornando difícil encontrar partidas.

Valor questionável
A sensação geral é de que o jogo parece um “free-to-play” com loja embutida, mas cobra preço cheio, o que gera desconfiança sobre o custo-benefício.

💡 Conclusão

Rematch tem potencial e uma proposta divertida, mas o estado atual é de frustração. Entre bugs constantes, matchmaking ruim, falta de conteúdo e monetização agressiva, o jogo exige muita paciência — e quem compra esperando uma experiência competitiva estável provavelmente vai se decepcionar.

I don’t usually write reviews, but Rematch is so bad it deserves a warning label. There are zero redeeming qualities here. The gameplay is clunky, the controls feel like they were designed to kill you, and the “mechanics” (if you can even call them that) are laughably broken. The graphics look like they were ripped from a bargain bin game from 2005, the audio is grating, and the UI makes no sense.

There’s no fun, no depth, and no polish. It honestly feels like a half-finished school project that somehow got shoved onto Steam. Even at a discount, it’s not worth a cent.

Save yourself the time, the money, and the brain cells. Rematch is an unplayable mess that should have never been released.

25 euro per un gioco che è uguale se non peggio della beta è un furto.
Ah e oltre ai 25 euro ovviamente c'è il pass così ci inculano 2 volte.
Invece di spendere i soldi per pagare i diritti di immagine di calciatori (neanche così iconici tra l'altro) potrebbero pagare dei disgraziati capaci di creare una fisica della palla che funzioni e non il gambling per capire se sta volta bloccherai la palla o no.
Al momento è un gioco strapieno di bug e ottimizzato così così.
Il problema è che ha tanto potenziale ma mi pare che pensino più ad aggiungere skin che a renderlo valido e divertente.
In conclusione probabilmente a breve torneranno tutti su Rocket League stufi di una beta che costa 25€ e sto gioco morirà.
Sono pronto a ricredermi ma per il momento non vale i soldi che costa, non compratelo finchè non lo fixano.

Preferirei se anzichè buttare via i nostri soldi in sponsorizzazioni che non portano nulla al gioco, pagassero dei consulenti e programmatori per sistemare i 1000+ problemi che ha questo gioco. Macchinoso e poco fluido, non si capisce quando il portiere respinge palla o la tiene in mano, palloni che ti attraversano, lag generale, mappe che riducono il framrate. Oltre a ciò anche poca personalizzazione dei calciatori. Ho pagato il preordine sperando di sostenere un team che volesse portare un gioco di qualità ma dopo mesi dall'uscita la situazione non fa che peggiorare e anzichè sistemare i problemi vedo comparire solo nuove sponsorizzazioni inutili.
Spero in un futuro migliore. 
Ad ora non credo giocherò più molto salvo nuovi aggiornamenti correttivi.

So I won this game by winning the clip contest of the Beta, the Elite version, made a few teams with strong players from beta,( first team was all three of us who won first second and third place of that contest, what a awesome coincidence, had argue about the playstyle, them not being good enough, had a whole life thinking what if this game could be the game i can reach esport with, i'm good at it, and i'm early, and i actually won something, saw my goals on youtube shorts, gain reputation on a discord, devs were listening to feedback, lot of bugs but game was fun, skillcap was high, people were comparing with RL. That was my new daily game, browsing youtube for new meca, strategies etc... Then game came out, more bugs, devs trying to suppress meca, cause newbies were complaining about them being to strong, when it just raised the bar needed to face what we call ELITE( what a joke this ranking system btw, everyone was elite, and if you were not you were really bad at the game let's face it, just so you understand you couldn't demote from master or any rank before, so you could reach master with 39% winrate total, if you just had luck finding good team and locking in a few winstreak, you could demote of ELITE but was still easy to climb, cause matchmaking was a joke, solo q player facing 5 man premade, random rank between all of us, etc you could even leave game to not lose rank.)

But then another patch with the game's coming out made the game so much more slower, like 30% slower easily, less skill cap.

Latest patch dropped few days ago, game is done, solo play, hundred of hours spend mastering meca, training your aim, your dribbles, having skills, it's all gone, game's even slower, the PRIO( who gets the ball first from a pass or shoot) system cooked to the bone, don't even want to talk about it, uselesss ugly collab for cosmetics, even more bugs, even more server problems, less fun, mods working with devs on the official discord even left because they were to many complaints and the dude was in denial, yes kentain i talk about you, man was here in the playtest, had a whole life of rivals, friends, teammates we all knew each other, like real football everyone had their playstyle, now you're doomed to play one way like an npc of devs, they still can't play their own game as usual i guess, they don't want to listen to the real sweaty gamers investing so much time. So unless the devs pull out a no man sky save, see ya everyone. Try to enjoy while the servers are still up.

Ill start with the fact that in theory this is a perfect soccer game, its semi-realistic 3rd person soccer at its finest and the boxed in field provides for extremely dynamic plays and one of a kind scramble situations, but... the solo queue experience simply ruins everything about this game. there are games where players arent terrible but 9/10 its like the persons never even seen a soccer ball before, even in 4v4/5v5 having just one poor teammate ruins the whole game, and idk if its blue locks fault some people just seem unable to pass at all or their just terrible at it, overshooting,passing to the enemy team multiple times these things would be fine if they were idk good at the game,but obviously thaqt couldnt be the case idk how many games ive had just sitting in gk just watching my teammates lose the ball and miss shots, just for me to come out the goal for 2 seconds and score, and then after hours of the worst soccer players ive ever seen, i run into a troll,wether hes purposefully passing to the enemy,refusing to pass while getting doubled,even calling for the ball constantly just to stand still after i send them a perfect pass. "Rematch — это не игра, а чудовищное недоразумение, которое само по себе является оскорблением для всего понятия 'видеоигра'. Создатели будто собрались с целью доказать: 'Смотрите, мы можем потратить время и силы так, чтобы результат выглядел хуже, чем если бы не делали вообще ничего'. Здесь нет ни капли вдохновения, ни грамма вкуса — только удручающая демонстрация того, как люди, далекие от таланта, пытаются изобразить труд. Играть в Rematch — всё равно что добровольно смотреть на мокрый картон, пока тебе рассказывают бессмысленную сказку. Эта работа — не просто слабая, она унизительна: её существование кричит о том, что авторы даже не поняли, насколько низко они пали. Rematch оставляет после себя чувство не злости, а жалости — но самой горькой, уничижительной жалости к тому, кто искренне счёл это достойным показа людям." P.S Chat GPT

I love the game, and right now it’s my main game. The ranked system is definitely better than before, so congrats on the work done there.

But what has always frustrated me is the priority on volleys. So many times I’m in front of the opponent and lose the ball, while other times I’m behind and somehow win it. There are plenty of situations where the animation clearly shows my player going for a header… but nothing happens, the shot just continues as normal. The same thing happens when I cut the ball on the ground: sometimes it doesn’t register, other times it even gives me interception points, but the play just carries on like nothing happened.

Another thing that’s been really bothering me is the ping. I’m constantly at 50/60, and the lowest I’ve ever managed to get was 45. It makes the experience less consistent and quite frustrating.

I’d really love if you could fix the volley priority, because that’s honestly what has been killing my will to play (and I’m guessing for a lot of people too). For this reason, I’m leaving a negative review for now, but as soon as this is fixed, I’ll gladly change it to a positive one, because I really do enjoy the game.

Bom... o jogo começou com uma promessa única, com a beta cheia de bugs mas na esperança de arrumar com o passar do tempo. Meses se passaram do lançamento e fizeram uma "pré atualização" antes da temporada 1 que ainda respirava alguma luz no fim do túnel de que existia um caminho positivo na espera por comprometimento pelas palavras dos próprios devs. Infelizmente com essa última atualização percebi que não tenho mais paciência para algo que só vai ainda mais para o buraco... É REPULSIVO jogar hoje em dia, nem comentarei sobre campeonatos que é apenas meta atrás de meta e realmente se a ideia era não ser um fifa ou quaisquer outro jogo de futebol padrão (só que em terceira pessoa), conseguiram reproduzir algo que te torna uma máquina de fazer apenas [b] O MESMO LANCE [/b] . Se for comprar este jogo saiba que não é sobre futebol e nem chega perto disso, é REMATCH e acabou e não passa nada além disso

Nessa altura do campeonato os devs já estão de sacanagem. 

O jogo passou por beta, public beta, temporada 0, e continua com bugs ridículos. Seja de interface, conexão, bug de áudio, de replay... a lista é longa. Uma coisa que incomoda é terem adicionado features de skins que simplesmente não existem, como pulseiras. Deixaram ao acaso do tipo "vai que um dia exista". Pelo amor...

É um absurdo e um desrespeito o jogo não ter, sequer, um histórico de partidas. Algo extremamente simples, visto que o jogo já salva um compilado das estatísticas.

Não dá pra saber seu score, placar de partidas anteriores, absolutamente nada. 

O jogo tem uma mecânica da hora, só que tem bugs tão ridículos que desmotiva qualquer jogador. 
Se fosse um pouco mais refinado teria sucesso. 

Quando o jogo deixar de ser bugado a cada update, volto aqui pra mudar a análise.

I cannot recommend this game at $30...
Literally what is the monetization plan here SloClap? 
You have a (good)barebones competitive soccer game that NEEDS a large player base to thrive, and put it behind a $30 wall...
And then you make everything in the shop, basically free...
While selling licensed skins that almost nobody will want...

Make the game cheaper, get some new players in, find a new way to make money, because this cannot be working for you, and it's surely not working for the ever dwindling playerbase. 



((My initial review: Good game, wish the devs would step up their efforts a bit harder though. That seems to be a universal statement these days though.))

Although Rematch released in a rough state, the constant updates and communication that Sloclap maintains over time tells me that this game has a ton of potential and it will achieve it soon. The only other game that compares to this is Rocket League, and I prefer this way more as it aims for a grounded and intense experience. I couldn't recommend this game enough, it's only going to get better from here.

Jogo tem grande potencial, mas falta carinho em muitos pontos por parte dos desenvolvedores. Seja em problemas relacionados a performance, como problemas com quedas de FPS do nada e, em alguns casos, ainda problemas de crash do jogo, coisas não saudáveis para o jogo (como um void pra puxar a bola sem correr, que não existe razão para existir), e diversos problemas relacionados à networking, que faz com que a experiência se torne, no mínimo, "exótica", onde em diversos momentos personagens simplesmente se teleportam de posições porque sim (até em 36ms).

Com tantas chances de mudança, diversos patches durante a season 0 que não tiveram nenhuma mudança significativa nos problemas, ao menos não de maneira positiva, e um lançamento de uma "Temporada 1.0" com literalmente 0 mudanças relevantes (exceto passe de batalha e reset de ranked), acho que já se esgotaram as esperanças e chances que se poderia dar à um jogo.
Em seu único local de comunicação com os jogadores (o discord oficial), diversos problemas e até muitass insatisfações de jogadores são reconhecidas pelos desenvolvedores, mas tudo é sempre adiado para um futuro patch, ao qual se aguarda desde o lançamento oficial do jogo

Mesmo com tamanho potencial, não tenho certeza de que um dia ele realmente alcançará o status que pode.

Ok, il temps de passer aux choses sérieuses à propos de ce jeu et de dire tout ce qui ne va pas 

[h2] Contexte [/h2]

Tout d'abord un peu de contexte,
J'ai acheté ce jeu en sachant que, l'équipe à l'origine du jeu [b] SIFU [/b], était derrière. Je m'attendais à un jeu fluide, exigeant et gratifiant quand on s'implique et qu'on prend le temps de saisir les mécaniques.

[h2] Le jeu en saison 0 [/h2]

J'ai donc découvert un jeu avec un gameplay émergent, permettant, avec de l'entrainement, de réaliser des setups très gratifiants et impactant pour peu qu'on prenne le temps de maîtriser la physique du jeu et ses (nombreux) contrôles. Les positions, les tactiques, même être gardien, tout demandait de la pratique et de l'expérience mais était extrêmement gratifiant.
Avec le temps, des petits arrangements sur le gameplay (les blades Shots trop forts et le poste de gardien trop faible), une meilleure fluidité des serveurs et [b] SURTOUT [/b] un système permettant de ban les joueurs aux comportements problématiques, le jeu aurait été parfait et aurait de lui-même gagner en popularité.

[h2] Mais arriva la Saison 1 [/h2]
Bons points :  Les blades shots sont moins forts et plus compliqué à setup rapidement

Sinon, quelle désillusion ! Le nombre de joueurs diminue, les collaborations sont franchement oubliables et la publicité (qui permettrait d'attirer des nouveaux joueurs) est absente...
Mais le [b] PIRE [/b] :

[h3] 1) Les développeurs décident de changer drastiquement la physique du jeu (Vous avez eu des BETA TESTEURS avant de sortir le jeu ?!) [/h3]
- Les personnages ont une inertie qui rend le contrôles, alors si fluides, lourds et imprévisibles. Utiliser son boost devient une punition pour naviguer avec la balle ;
- Les hitbox des personnages sont parfois un mur ou parfois disparaissent dans des interactions où elles étaients pourtant présentes ce qui rend les interactions entre les personnages aléatoires et frustrantes
- Le ballon passe d'un personnage à l'autre sans qu'aucune action particulière ne soit réalisée par les joueurs. Il suffit juste que la hitbox d'un personnage frôle vos pieds (sans rien faire) et le ballon atterit magiquement en votre possession ;
- Les interactions avec le ballon lorsqu'il est en l'air, sont imprévisibles. On ne sait jamais si on aura le contrôle de balle ou si l'adversaire aura une prio (Même le boost qui, auparavant en cas d'utilisation simultanée, forçait un 50/50, semble ne plus exister) ;
- Tout le temps investis à essayer de setups est perdu et il faut tout reprendre à 0. J'ai eu l'impression de changer de jeu d'une saison à l'autre

[h3] 2) TOUJOURS PAS DE SYSTEME DE REPORT INTEGRE [/h3]
- Aucune communication à ce sujet ;
- Les développeurs ont fait le choix d'avoir une communauté toxique plutôt que de voir leur nombre de joueur baisser (Vous perdez quand même des joueurs au final, donc bonne décision, hein ?) ;
- Il n'existe [b] AUCUNE [/b] sanction pour les leavers durant les matchs classés et aucun système quand un coéquipier marque volontairement dans son propre camp et/ou aide l'équipe adverse. 

ET NON : un report sur Steam n'a aucune valeur, vous continuerez de retomber avec ces gens in-game, je vous l'assure. EN PLUS, comble de la bétise, un fois qu'un joueur quitte le match, on ne peut tout simplement plus le signaler. Je dis BRAVO

[h2] Conséquences [/h2]
Résultats : Les matchs classés sont un enfer, vous allez prier pour tomber avec une équipe sans leaver, sans comportements antisportifs,
Un jeu qui aurait pu briller avec un gameplay qui se serait approfondi avec le temps mais qui malheureusement change drastiquement d'un mois sur l'autre

[h3] Un mot aux développeurs [/h3]

C'est vraiment à ça que vous vouliez que le jeu ressemble ? 

Vous réaliser que la frustration des joueurs en saison 0 concernant le nouveau gameplay est, très certainement, liée à de l'inexpérience et à un manque d'approfondissement des mécaniques de leur part ?

Vous avez au moins implémentés un MMR pour garantir aux joueurs occasionnels ou expérimentés de tomber avec des gens de leurs niveaux ?

Vous réalisez que changer la physique d'un jeu, inciter les comportements toxiques et vos priorités sont les raisons principales de la disparition des joueurs ?


Vous auriez pu avoir une base solide de joueurs fidèles qui, avec le temps, aurait appréhendé votre jeu, ses mécaniques et sa physique. Mais non, à la place vous avez décidé de faire plaisir à Jean-Michel Random qui est frustré de ne pas avoir pu briller 10 secondes avec le ballon dans un jeu qu'il ne relancera jamais et dans lequel il ne s'est pas investi. 

Vous avez choisis votre camp, le jeu sera connu pour sa toxicité et non sa complexité. Pour ses solutions à court-termes imprévisibles qui dénaturent le jeu. Enfin, il sera une déception pour vous comme pour nous. Un jeu au potentiel brillant gâché par la nécessité de vouloir toucher un public qui n'aurait jamais été le sien dans tous les cas.

 You're too focused on the "teamwork" aspect of the game. Add some individuality: You can create a diverse playstyle by adding passive perks (such as increasing the stamina of a double boost through the dribbling option or increasing the dribbling options through the kick strength.) This is not a proposal to make "hero football", nah. You need to add the chanse for a player to be unique, rather than being part of another monotonous passing game in the spirit of Japanese baseball.

We play football, not baseball, and we need to be able to compete and show our skills in the game. Stop wasting time on nonsense and re-drawing animations, focus on creating a game that is enjoyable for the players.

Game is dead for me.

Bugs I can forgive. But doing FOMO just because you as a developer can, is not fun or wholesome. Season 0 pass had to be bought, and then once Season 0 ends, you no longer can unlock anything in it, but at least you can buy a new Season 1 pass! This is standard practice in games nowadays, yeah. It's also a practice I personally do not enjoy. I hoped Sloclap would be better with this, considering their history of being pretty decent towards their player base, but guess not.

Considering the theme of the game is soccer, the player base is by default toxic. This makes playing in longer sessions unfun. To grind the needed however many hours in a short amount of time is just torture. The best consumer friendly approach would be to let you take your time whenever. And I'm not even talking about the 'above and beyond' final extra stage of the pass which were very grindy themselves.

Anyway, thank you for coming to my TED Talk.

Oyun gerçekten eğlenceli. Temel oynanış çok keyifli; topa vurmak, birebir mücadele kazanmak, pas atmak, pasın gole dönüşmesi, gol atmak, kaleye gelen topu tutmak ya da tackle/slide yapmak oyunu canlı tutuyor. Görsel efektler genel olarak iyi, gözü yormuyor (bazı haritalar hariç). Tasarım tarafı da hoş. Yani özetle: Temelinde gayet keyifli bir oyun.
Ama bu oyun sonuçta online bir oyun. Yani mesele sadece oynanış değil; anlık veri aktarımı, senkronizasyon gibi konular da devreye giriyor. Açıkçası çıkışta bu konulara çok hazırlıklı değillerdi. Oyun çıkalı üç ay oldu, netcode sorunları daha yeni toparlanmaya başladı diyebilirim. “Season 0” aslında biraz da bu hataların düzeltilme süreci oldu.
Oyun derinlik sunabiliyor ama mesela volenin fazla güçlü olması oyunu bir süre sonra aynı tarza yönlendiriyor. Pas yapıp küçük oyunlar kurmak istediğinizde de en az sizin kadar uyumlu birkaç kişiye ihtiyacınız var. Yoksa sinirlenip boş yere tilt oluyorsunuz. O yüzden arkadaşlarla oynamak çok daha keyifli.
Solo oynamak istiyorsanız biraz sabırlı olmanız lazım. Özellikle EU serverlarında Elite ranka geldiğinizde maçlar daha iyi oluyor. Oynadığım 10 maçın 6-7’sinde pas yapan, oyunu okuyan insanlarla karşılaştım. Ama kafanıza göre hareket ederseniz çok da kazanamıyorsunuz. Çünkü bu oyun gerçekten takım oyununu ödüllendiriyor, tek bir oyuncunun bile katkısı çok fark ettiriyor.
Benim en çok keyif aldığım anlar, takım oyununa uyum sağlayabildiğim maçlar oldu. Tavsiyem önce kendi stilinizi bulun, her şeyi aynı anda yapmaya çalışmayın. Görüşünüzü genişletin, temel kontrollere alışın ve takım oyununa uyum sağlamaya çalışın.
(Blue Lock tayfa! tamam ben de çok seviyorum blue lock ama gereksiz hareketlere kalkışmayın)

For context, I'm playing on EU. For TL;DR, the game is young and has faults but is genuinely fun at its core, especially with friends.

Gameplay:
I usually lean toward more simulation-style football games (coming from FIFA/FC), but I think Rematch’s gameplay loop is really solid. Even though it’s more arcade-y, it still rewards real football knowledge: passing, making runs, positioning, knowing when to switch players. That makes it satisfying to play if you love football itself, not just arcade mechanics.
The only thing is that the skill ceiling doesn’t feel very high. In FIFA you’ve got dribbling chains, in Rocket League you’ve got ball control that takes ages to master. In Rematch, there are a few, but not many mechanics like that. 

Matchmaking:
This is where the game feels rougher. I was able to climb into Elite quite quickly just by using my game sense, and I feel that to be able to climb to the top, most games should require high mechanics AND game sense. This is in part due to the very wide matchmaking which sees players ranked from Platinum to Elite mixed in together, which should not happen. They need to tighten the matchmaking a bit.

Content:
Right now the game feels a little bare-bones. Season 0 dragged on, and apart from quick matches and ranked there wasn’t much else to do. Again, the loop is good enough that I've seen myself play regularly from the release in June to now September, but the season felt a bit long.
I also feel like they are lacking some content/features which should already be in the game, like proper report system, in-game player profiles with stats and ranks, and the option to quickly launch a free play with friends to pass, shoot, or practice before a match. Beyond that, I’m not sure exactly what else should be added, but it definitely needs more variety to keep things interesting.

Conclusion:
For me, it’s already a really fun game. I think its faults don't inherently make it bad at all (I feel other reviews are sometimes a bit harsh). If the devs keep listening to the community, updating the game and adding features, I think Rematch could easily move from good to great.

Should you buy it? I think the price tag is fair considering what the game is and what it will likely become.

Bought the Elite version to get the headstart and because I loved the idea of the game. Was super excited to get into the game and get my friends on board. Didn't know it was getting released to gamepass for free and ultimately wasted my money. No crossplay at the start, and the game is attrocious when it comes to the solo grind (griefers, matchmaking was basically non-existant, leavers with a horrid fill system, etc.)

Forced to play the game on xbox gamepass just to play with friends. Get all the way through the season pass and get ranked up to Elite. Still no crossplay.

Then the company finally releases crossplay so I can get back to my Elite edition of the game (unable to refund due to the play time from the early access) with about 2 weeks left in the season. Unfortunately I am unable to complete the season pass a second time ... but they also add more rewards to the end of the season pass for those who built up the gems from the start. Also declare ranked rewards for season 1 ... have just enough time to mostly solo grind into Platinum (friends not really wanting to risk their elite ranks due to the horrid matchmaking, server instability, and griefers especially near the end of the season) ...

Left feeling like the company took my money (as one of those who actually paid them money) and just screwed me over every which way throughout this initial period. Would have been nice if there could have been a way to merge the progress or if they could have offered something for those in a similar position as I.

RANT over ...

The game itself is fun in concept. However, the disconnect between what a player sees and the game sees can be quite frustrating. Network conditions can be quite abysmal. Having a goal scored on you when you see your character catch the ball only to have it zip behind you into the next feels bad. Stabbing at the ball and chasing after it, only to have it zip back to the feet of the enemy team feels bad. Being between the ball and the attacker and losing priority for a block for whatever reason feels bad. This happens quite often.

Don't get me wrong, I know this post is filled with bitterness - but the truth is ... the game is fun when everything is smooth and working right (win or lose) ... and I will keep playing for now as they are actively trying to make the game better and deal with all the complaints I've mentioned (aside from customer loyalty) ... it just sucks when you feel slighted and disregarded. That's the reason for the not recommended, I can't stand by this company with how the experience has left me feeling.

間違いなく値段が高い、このゲーム性とコンテンツで3700円で販売するのはちょっと・・・ってプレイしていて感じてしまう。比較されるロケットリーグのように無料とまではいかないが過去の有料版の2000円台前半くらいになってようやくってイメージだ、コンテンツが増えてくれることを切に願う。
肝心のゲーム性は神ゲー、サッカーゲームをやったことある人はもちろんFPSやアクションゲーム経験者も触ってみたら楽しさを実感できると思う。
ランク戦は他のゲームと比べて最高ランクへの道のりは優しい（あくまで他のゲームと比較して）。しかし今から最高ランクに到達するには忍耐強く試合を経験する必要があるが、やっていれば必ずランクが上がっていくため成長を実感しやすく楽しい。またyoutubeで日本語でも初心者向けの動画が数多く知識やテクニックを紹介しているため洋ゲーと違って勉強しやすいのは良い部分。
とにかく各ランクごとに人口が少なくなってきており頻繁に同じ名前のプレイヤーやフルパーティと当たる。人口を増やしつつ初心者を熟練者と簡単にマッチさせないような守る仕組みをしっかり作って欲しいと感じる。

I really want to love this game, because it is extremely fun when played with people that actually know what they are doing, so when it works, it’s an absolute blast.

But here’s the problem: I’m a Master rank player, and I keep getting matched with teammates who are nowhere near my level. Just recently, I checked my team on Rematch Tracker and saw I had a Silver, a Gold, a Plat, and a Diamond… while I was sitting in Master. Meanwhile, the enemy team? COMPLETELY STACKED WITH ELITES. 

For a while, I actually thought matchmaking had been fixed after the last update. I was consistently seeing balanced teams, close matches, and it was fun again. But of course, right when I’m about to push into Elite, suddenly I’m paired up with ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ teammates.

It’s exhausting. It feels like the game punishes solo players, and instead of testing skill, it tests patience. The core gameplay is fantastic, but until matchmaking is ACTUALLY fixed, this game will just keep pushing away the solo players.

Plusieurs mois que le jeu est sorti, pourtant il n'est toujours pas fini (il n'est pas précisé que c'est une EA) :
- désyncs récurrentes : tu tacles, tu te vois tacler dans les jambes de l'adversaire, mais il court encore avec le ballon, puis le ballon revient dans tes pieds, un sketch ! 
- joueurs toxiques avec encore aucun moyen de report
- mises à jours des devs qui règlent certains problèmes (ou pas) et qui en aggravent d'autres
- aucun nouveau geste technique depuis la sortie
- les mécaniques ne récompensent pas assez le jeu en équipe
- le jeu est très mal opti, c'est encore pire quand on joue avec le fameux crossplay qui a mis 4 mois à voir le jour; pourtant le jeu n'est pas spécialement beau
- les animations ne sont pas fluides, l'input lag est énorme

Point positif, la boutique est mise à jour plus régulièrement que les soucis de lags.

Bref, je retesterai dans un an si le jeu n'est pas abandonné d'ici là !

3 kg kapusty kiszonej

20 dag słoniny

50 dag karczku

50 dag wołowiny od kotleta

30 dag kiełbasy zwyczajnej

20 dag boczku wędzonego

5 grzybów suszonych

koncentrat pomidorowy

papryka słodka w proszku

1 czubata łyżka majeranku

ziele angielskie

liść laurowy

4 duże cebule

Kapustę kiszoną 2 razy zagotować w wielkim garze, odlać wodę. W osobnym garnczku przetopić słoninę i wrzucić pokrojone kawałki mięsa. Mięso zrumienić i dodać 2 pokrojone w plastry cebule. Poddusić i dolać trochę wody. Gotować około 15 minut. Powstanie z tego gulasz. Po ugotowaniu wlać gulasz do kapusty kiszonej, wrzucić parę listków laurowych i ziele angielskie.

Teraz przystępujemy do krojenia kiełbasy i boczku. Wrzucamy na roztopioną słoninę i dodajemy pokrojoną cebulę. Całość dusimy i wrzucamy do gara z kapustą.

Grzyby namoczyć 1 godzinę i pokroić w paski. Wrzucić do gara z kapustą. Wszystko gotować 2 godziny, dodać koncentrat pomidorowy, pół paczki sproszkowanej papryki. Ponownie gotować 2 godziny.

Pod koniec gotowania dodać majeranek i zrobić zasmażkę z 3 łyżek mąki. Bigos będzie jeszcze smaczniejszy, gdy na drugi dzień podgotujemy go ponownie.

Rematch is actually a really fun game and the devs are doing good work fixing it up and removing bugs. The people complaining about the devs fixing stuff are copping hard because they bug abused and needed those bugs to be good. Playing the game as it’s intended is way more fun and teamplay feels super rewarding and satisfying. I’m hyped to see what’s ahead.

Ranked is the main issue right now because there isn’t much skill expression with the bugs in play. You can abuse them all the way to elite, so we end up with players who don’t have the brain or fundamentals to be there when they really belong in plat or diamond. Hopefully with the changes and fixes the game will lean more on fundamentals and reward it properly through rank.

Ahhh, finally a breath of fresh air after all the recycled football slop that AAA companies keep pumping out every 6 months. This game is the definition of developer love, and it shows. You can feel that the devs really took their time and crafted it with passion and dedication (unlike other football garbage, yes, I’m looking at you PES and FIFA).

Now, I know it’s unfair to compare Rematch to those games, but in today’s market there are only a handful of titles that actually capture the feeling of football. Rematch (even though it leans more into an arcade vibe) nails that feeling perfectly.

Of course, before people grab their pitchforks: yes, I know the game feels “unfinished.” There are bugs, optimization problems, lag, matchmaking issues, and constant mechanical changes that sometimes make things worse. But at the end of the day, it’s obvious this is a true passion project and for that, we should be thankful.

Because let’s be real: in today’s standards it’s nearly impossible to find a game without pay-to-win nonsense or endless paywalls. That’s why Sloclap has my utmost respect. Please, never change your ways, we don’t need another EA tragedy.

Rematch is still new and fresh BUT has transparency for the players, and made by people who clearly love the beautiful game of Football. That deserves respect, love, and support. Personally, I just want to see this game thrive and maybe add a punishment system for people who don’t [b] PASS [/b] . [b] YES, I’M LOOKING AT YOU, MAIN CHARACTER SYNDROME HARDSTUCKS. PRESS THE PASS BUTTON. [/b]

As an Elite-rank player, my biggest wish is for the devs to fix the game-breaking mechanics ASAP, because last time I checked, no real football player can fly or pull off physically impossible moves.

Overall, massive respect to the developers. It’s a great game, a fun game (especially when your ape teammates actually pass) and it’s infinitely better with friends.

Love the core gameplay. The devs seem to be listening to the community, however the patches should have been more frequent. 

Highly recommend this game, especially if you play with friends
Based on what is there, it should have been a free game. Not worth the price tag at all and doesn't seem to be getting any more worth it over time.

I REALLY want to leave a good review for this game and hope the community grows. I really want to enjoy this game. I can't. The hit detection which I would consider to be paramount in this kind of game...seemingly unreliable. Most of my  games my ping will be in the green (40-55 ping) and my shot/pass will be blocked or intercepted by opponents who aren't in blocking distance or a goalie not even diving toward where they need to be to catch the incoming shot. While my goalkeeper will dive and grab, gain possession...and then slide through the interaction giving the opponents a goal. Steals, tackles, shots, saves, everything feels like if the game/server is having a bad day then you are too. Even playing ranked feels pointless because apparently the ranks don't matter. You have some of the higher tiered players being matched with the lowest of the lows...there is no rhyme or reason to the "ranked". You can't even be de-ranked once you hit a new level (ranks can't drop//gold can't drop to silver no matter how many times you lose with no rp to pad the loss.) On top of these problems there is often a 5+ minute wait for a match even if you have crossplay enabled. Truly a fun concept (soccer with rocket league-ish logic and game play) but it doesn't quite deliver on the experience. If the game tightens up it's game play and fixes whatever discrepancies are constantly happening within the servers I will gladly change this to a positive review.

Every patch makes the game worse, and the player base is either brain dead or 5 year olds. 
Matchmaking is non-existent. 
The devs confessed that during matchmaking masters and elites can get matched with bronzes and silvers. 

Absolutely unplayable. 

Even if matchmaking improves, it might not matter because you cant go down a ranked. Me and my friends can boost a mentally lacking player to elite, and he will stay there indefinitely. 

If I can get one thing to change, its the ranking system.
Make it possible to go down ranks while simultaneously make it harder to go up and down in the ranks. instead of 100 rank point per division, make it 300 and divide each rank into 5 divs instead of 3. This will give better indication of the level of each player. 


I understand that there might be things I dont know and therefore cant consider, but at the state the game is in right now, its unbearable. Getting matched with players who dont know how to catch the ball, players that start and end their every encounter with the ball with a rainbow flick, players that passing is a foreign idea for them.


Also, I highly doubt that the report system actually does something. I have never once saw someone getting punished in any way, either for self goals, griefing, toxic behavior (with quick commands or VC), or for leaving. Seems like a lack of a report system is something a lot of players were complaining about, so the devs implemented a button that doesnt do anything just to make us feel good.


When I started playing, I had no complaints about the gameplay itself, but after the last few patches, moving your character became horrendous. The movement system is now broken. Entering a defensive stance following a run makes you "skate", which could be managed if it was consistent, but you have to guess when that happens. The priority system is unpredictable, so you cant know for sure whether you are going to hit the ball or not when you are next to another player, even if it might look that you are closer. 

Sometimes the ball just passes through you, even in free play where ping is not an issue. Its especially infuriating when you are the keeper and ball makes a sound as if you caught it and the catching animation plays, only then for it to go right through you.

At this point I would not recommend playing the game, unless you play as a 5 stack, but even then the game might troll you with its many bugs and you decide to wait for the next patch, hoping it will fix all the ♥♥♥♥ the previous patches created.

Season 1 Edit: After the season 1 patch, movement feels a bit smoother but thats all. Not only skating in defensive stance still exist, there is now also skating when running. Matchmaking is still ♥♥♥♥. Somehow the devs screwed up the party feature, we often cant see each other when in party, and can enter games that get canceled because the game wont load it for all of us. 
Continuing the trend, this patch made the game worse.

edit 2:
Every patch introduces new bugs and exploits. every time I open the game I discover that the players I get matched with are getting worse and worse. The devs said they will change the matchmaking process to get matched with players in your own level, but now you cant even verify if thats true because trackers no longer work. there is still 0 evidence that the report system works, there is no one online talking about bans or suspensions, no one even has a friend or something that got banned. Bugs that were recognized a few patches ago as a todo task are still present. everything that was ♥♥♥♥ in the game 3 patches ago are still available for you to suffer through. I dont know what the devs' direction is, but it seems they give 0 ♥♥♥♥♥ about making the game properly work, and are more focused on microtransactions. I am taking a break from the game, and you should NOT buy or even consider buying the game. It was fun while it lasted.

TL:DR
Horrible playerbase (skill wise), bugs, movement and priority systems are bad, each patch so far made it worse.

Core gameplay ejemplar. Diversion por donde lo veas, dejando de lado de que los servers no siempre son buenos (region dependiente) y que la gente esta mas preocupada por usar bugs como mecanicas en vez de jugar al futbol (pasar la pelota) aun asi es una de las experiencias mas completas de futbol arcade que hay. Experiencia unica que tiene la capacidad de ser un juego altamente competitivo.

¿Lo malo? Podria no recomendar este juego por la comunidad por si sola, mucha de la comunidad es altamente toxica y solo basta ver el reddit o el discord para darte cuenta. Las updates son lentas, la reparacion de bug toma mucho tiempo (los devs son un estudio chico pero aveces hay simples bugs que no reparan hasta parches grandes) aun asi debido a que el core gameplay es bastante bueno tengo fe que en un futuro podria ser mejor juego. Meta actual un poco aburrido, para resumir se hace un pase largo desde mitad de cancha o los laterales hacia el area de arquero y ahi el jugador puede hacer una volea casi imposible de bloquear defensivamente. Esto hace que las matches se vuelvan altamente aburridas y predecibles. 

Si quieres tomarte el juego medianamente "enserio" un team/duo es casi un requerimiento para las ranked (experiencia parecida a la del lol honestamente) pero que es muy recompensante cuando la pelota esta moviendose por todo el campo y salen jugadas magistrales.

Recomendado si buscar una exp diferente de futbolito que fifi

No me gusta el fútbol. Pero este juego me agarró del cogote y me hizo gritar “¡pasala, burro!” a gente que probablemente esté comiendo cereales mientras juega.
Los partidos son cortitos, como los sueños de ascenso en la B Metropolitana. Si te va mal, no sufrís tanto. Si te va bien, te creés el Dibu Martínez del teclado.
Ahora, los compañeros randoms… eso es otro partido. A veces te toca alguien que juega como si tuviera los dedos enyesados. Otras, un Messi con WiFi. Por eso, lo ideal es jugar con amigos. Al menos si se mandan una cagada, podés putearlos con cariño.
El control al principio parece que estás manejando un lavarropas con joystick. Pero después de 100 partidos, ya sabés moverte, apuntar y hasta pasar (sí, pasar, esa técnica ancestral que algunos creen que es opcional).
Y hablando de experiencia, no soy cualquiera. Soy Kannubis, con más de 134 horas en el campo, más que muchos jugadores profesionales en pretemporada.
Mis estadísticas están ahí, en Rematch Tracker.
No es por presumir, pero tengo más partidos que excusas para no ir al gimnasio.
En resumen: no pagué por este juego, pero sí por el ego que me dio.
Lo recomiendo si querés sufrir, reírte y putear

Este juego es un engaño. No solo salió lleno de errores, sino que la empresa prometió actualizaciones y mejoras que nunca llegaron. Pasaron meses y los problemas siguen siendo los mismos o peores.

FPS inestables y rendimiento pésimo.

Ping altísimo que arruina cualquier partida.

Desconexiones constantes del servidor.

Emparejamiento roto y falta de jugadores (las partidas son un chiste).

La tienda se desconecta todo el tiempo, lo que limita cualquier intento de personalización.

El resultado es una experiencia frustrante, incompleta y totalmente abandonada por sus desarrolladores. No lo recomiendo bajo ningún punto de vista. Me siento estafado por haber confiado en las promesas vacías del estudio.

Eviten gastar su dinero en esto.

After 375 hours in game, played a bunch of tournaments, playing for a top European team right now and will probably play the next Crossplay Tournament. it's time for me to do a review.

This game literally is one of the if not the best competitive game that there is. Why ? Because it's ALL about skill. No hero bs, no different weapons or abilities. None of that here. The difference between someone who wins and someone who loses is SKILL. Not that the winner had a better item or hero. He just had better knowledge of the game and a better mastery of the mechanics.

Now there are negative points to the game that you WILL face, but they all can be avoided:
- Egoistic players who typically never pass the ball. You can avoid these by playing with 4 other players on discord or TS or friends of you or finding a competitive team. Like in most competitive games, you almost have no other choice than to have a friend group or team with who you only play with.
- Netcode. Yeah it's sometimes a little random and goofy, but way way better than when the game came out. It's most of the time actually stable and good. People also have to understand that doing a ball physics like Sloclap did here is EXTREMELY hard to do. Any person who developed games or studied in game dev knows this.
- Priority system. Even though it's quite logical most of the time it's still frustrating sometimes to not get the ball for no reason. But there are tons of reasons of why you don't get the ball. How close are you to the ball ? Did you try to control it ? Rainbow it ? Pass it ? Lob pass it ? Did you use extra effort (temporary speed boost) ? There is a whole list of things that you can do to have the priority on the ball and most of the time the other player just did something that actually gave the priority for a reason.

That's it. These are the only true negative points of the game which as I explained can all be actually avoided if you activate your brain for 5 seconds. 

I really do love the game it really has an insanely big potential but as players, we can't do really much besides playing the game, it's all in the devs hands. But we all know (by we I mean the actual community of the game) that if the dev continues to update the game and work hard on it (which they are doing btw) it really can be a good concurrent to Valorant, CS2, Overwatch and LoL. I personally think that the game will really shine in 6 months to 1 year later after this review.

Does this game really is worth buying at this price ? Yes, BUT only if you are aware that you have to play with the same group or team frequently. Otherwise, well you will suffer a bit so I would wait until it's like 15 euros, then it's really worth it.

I wish I could at least tentatively recommend the game. Not for what it is now. But, for what it may become in the future, should the developers change course from certain doom to, perhaps, one of the best esports games out there. As it stands, this is an early access game without the label. It is far too buggy and poorly thought out in terms of its competitive aspects to be considered anything more. Due to emergent behavior born of some of the bugs, such as the ippy slide, it has made an already slow to move small team of devs hesitate in their vision for the game, flawed as it may be. They can't seem to decide fully if they want this to be a new take on competitive football, or an unserious arcade game. It's left the competitive aspects of this game stuck in a limbo, where in some ways it incentivizes team play and coordination, but in other ways encourages rogue play that ruins the experience for the other four players on the team. And that's just the gameplay. When you look at their ranked system, the already shaky ground the game is standing on starts to crumble. They have looked at the many years of ranked systems that have been refined for decades and said "nah, I'ma do my own thing". They lock players from dropping tiers (for example, once you make platinum, you cannot fall out of platinum), which as one who has played any competitive game's ranked mode before would expect, leads to the level of skill in any given rank being a huge spectrum where you can have players in diamond who do not understand what all of the buttons on their controller/keyboard do, due to players being able to just rank up through sheer volume of games or playing with a premade. This is coupled with, what might be on its own the death of the game, the decision to allow players of any ranked tier to be matched with each other. This includes the highest ranked players in Elite and the lowest ranked players in Bronze being matched together. In other games, while solo queue is almost always a cesspool of creatures unknown to mankind, you at least reasonably expect some level of improvement in play from your teammates and opponents as you rank up. In rematch, you can grind your way all the way to Diamond, look to your left and right, and be surrounded by people who just began playing a few hours ago. And the reasoning for this is why I lead this review talking about the developers changing course from becoming their own undoing. For the locking people out of dropping tiers, they say that its to lessen stress for people trying to rank up. This is less egregious due to the attempt at making the experience of ranked less daunting to beginners, but still a dangerously naive decision. Without people being able to drop to lower tiers where they belong, there is little to no incentive for improvement. Why practice, why learn strategy, why improve spatial awareness, or learn when and how to pass when you're rewarded for poor play by ranking up due to sheer volume of games played or premade teams? It also leads to a lower quality of gameplay for those at higher ranks. But, before that would ever matter, we have to address why they allow all ranks to play in ranked together. The reasoning has little to nothing to do with the game itself or the integrity of the experience, funnily enough. Their reasoning (charitably paraphrasing) is that because players in PROFESSIONAL SOCCER LEAGUES can sometimes be better than people thought when they get moved up to higher levels of PROFESSIONAL SOCCER LEAGUES, they allow players of all ranks to play together. This is the single most bizarre reason for a decision made that effects the integrity of the competitive experience I have ever heard of. Obviously, this leads to beginners and terrible players lowering the quality of gameplay for higher ranked players. AND I AM NOT BLAMING THEM. Its not their fault that three hours after buying the game they are being matched with the best players in the game. But, it is ruining the experience for a large part of the player base, and leaves a path to nowhere for those who grind the game and get better. It makes ranked essentially quick play with ranks no one else can see. You can see the effects of this yourself with the nose diving player numbers. It is my hope that they will realize these errors and make changes before its too late, and a game with truly great potential to dominate the esports landscape won't end up as a what if. Because it's got great bones, it just needs vast improvements to the flesh that surrounds them.

At first, the game was fun. I played with friends and I didn't encounter many bugs, maybe a few minor glitches. After the last patch, the game is terrible. During a "boost," the camera gets stuck in a strange position, preventing rotation. When defending in goal, the camera is positioned behind my character. I try to dive left, and the animation shows the goalkeeper diving left and then suddenly back. The same thing happened when I, as goalkeeper, couldn't catch the ball. Rejoining the game fixed this problem. Movement became slow and inactive; simply moving the character now feels like turning a barge. Tackling doesn't require contact with the ball, and sliding can "magically" reach you even though you're far away from the ball. The beta tests were working better.

Игра получилась так себе. Похоже создателям просто наплевать на свою игру. Вместо нормального релиза они выпустили BattlePass и комплекты скинов а на качество самой игры и сетевой код махнули рукой. Кривая регистрация, лаги серверов, вылеты - всё это имеет место быть
Стоишь на воротах и из-за того, что игра работает как попало, твой персонаж может просто не реагировать: вроде должен ловить мяч, а сервер считает, что нет, и вот - лёгкий гол
Игра с кроссплатформенным режимом - это отдельная боль. Во-первых - без него на поиск матча уходит значительно больше времени, а во-вторых - игроки на геймпадах зачастую настолько слабые, что ощущаются как боты. Случайно начинаешь поиск, отменяешь - а игре всё равно, она продолжает искать и может спокойно закинуть тебя в матч, будто ты ничего не отменял
Ну и куда же без «любимых» эгоистов и просто странных игроков. Есть три типа таких людей. Первый тип - обычные соло, которые при любом раскладе не дадут пас и не забьют сами, но будут настойчиво стоять на стороне противника и спамить тебе, чтобы ты отдал им пас. Второй тип - фотографы: они просто стоят в углу карты, ничего не делают, и по итогу матча у них мизерные от 0 до 600 очков. Третий, самый раздражающий тип - советчики: играют так же бесполезно, как вторые, но при этом ещё и пытаются рассказывать тебе, что ты делаешь неправильно. Есть ещё четвёртый тип игроков, но он настолько редкий, что я бы назвал его «легендарным». Это обычные, спокойные ребята, которые играют через пасы, думают командно и в целом хорошо отыгрывают. Но увидеть таких можно примерно раз в миллиард игр
